assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item related to testing
assertion_results.evidence: Priority 1 ('This Week') covers Sentry and uptime monitoring only. Priority 2 ('This Sprint') covers staging and deploy automation only. Testing does not appear until Priority 3, labelled 'Next 2-4 Weeks'. No short-term (this week / this sprint) action item is related to testing.

assertion_results.text: Output must mention the absence of a staging environment
assertion_results.evidence: Executive Summary: 'the absence of tests, staging environments, observability tooling, and formal processes creates compounding risk.' Priority 2 also explicitly addresses creating one: 'Create a staging environment on Heroku using Heroku Pipelines.'

assertion_results.text: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: Scorecard: 'CI/CD Pipeline | 2/10 | F'. A score of 2/10 is well below the midpoint of 5/10, satisfying the equivalence threshold for '2/5 or lower'.

assertion_results.text: Output must recommend a specific test type to adopt first, not just 'add tests'
assertion_results.evidence: Priority 3: 'Write integration tests for 3-5 critical API endpoints using Jest + supertest'. A specific test type (integration tests), tooling (Jest + supertest), and scope (critical API endpoints) are named.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend a full test suite rewrite as the first step
assertion_results.evidence: The first testing recommendation is scoped to 3-5 critical API endpoints and adding Playwright smoke tests for 2-3 frontend flows — incremental and targeted. No full rewrite is mentioned at any point.
